name: imerge
description: IMerge analyzes a proposed code change and predicts its likely impact, relevant tests, engineering risk, workflow delays, and safest next action.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n engine,web -c cyan,magenta "pnpm dev:engine" "pnpm --dir apps/web dev"
scripts.lint: pnpm --dir apps/web lint && services/engine/.venv/bin/ruff check services/engine
